## How to test

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows `feat/`, `fix/`, `chore/`, `docs/`, `refactor/`, `test/` prefix
- [ ] `bun run check && bun run lint && bun test` pass locally
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo test` pass locally
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing
- [ ] Updated docs / README if behaviour changed
